chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 58 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 23.01.2024 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for Respondents NO.2 to 4 Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel appearing for respondents No.2 to 4 / SMC has filed breakup and submits that the amount of Rs.8839/- is outstanding against the petitioner, which will be deducted in accordance with the law. This petition in the above terms is disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI
